hero.title: Domain-Specialized RAG
hero.description: mAI-Brain is an open-source domain-specific RAG chatbot framework that delivers precise, industry-tailored AI answers — not generic responses.

product.title: Why mAI-Brain?
product.subtitle: Purpose-built for domains that demand precision over generality.

domain.title: Domain-Specialized
domain.description: Industry-specific knowledge pipelines that understand context, terminology, and nuance — not just keywords.

vector.title: Qdrant Vector DB
vector.description: High-performance vector search powered by Qdrant for lightning-fast semantic retrieval at scale.

multimodel.title: Multi-LLM Support
multimodel.description: Seamlessly integrate DeepSeek, OpenAI, or Ollama — choose the model that fits your domain and budget.

opensource.title: Open Source
opensource.description: Fully open-source and self-hostable. No vendor lock-in, no hidden costs. Your data stays yours.

comparison.title: vs. Generic RAG
comparison.description: AnythingLLM answers questions. mAI-Brain answers questions the way your industry needs them answered.

rag.title: Advanced RAG Pipeline
rag.description: Sophisticated retrieval-augmented generation with chunking, embedding, and re-ranking optimized per domain.

product.comparisonSubtitle: Built for domains that can't afford vague answers.

about.title: Built by 다른새벽
about.subtitle: We believe AI should understand your industry, not just your questions.
about.story: 다른새벽 (OtherDawn) is an IT startup focused on making domain-specific AI accessible. While generic AI tools give you answers, they often miss the context that matters in specialized fields — healthcare, legal, finance, manufacturing, and more.
about.story2: mAI-Brain was born from this frustration: why settle for a chatbot that doesn't understand your world? We built an open-source framework where every component — from document ingestion to retrieval to generation — can be tailored to your domain.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Make domain-specialized AI accessible to every industry, every team, every professional — without vendor lock-in or enterprise pricing.

footer.description: Domain-specialized RAG framework for every industry.

metadata.title: 다른새벽 IT — Domain-Specialized RAG for Every Industry
